# Coder Settings

## Implementation checklist
- keep diffs minimal
- preserve profile boundaries
- use constructor injection only
- add explanatory comments where intent is not obvious
- wire required registrations in the same task
- remove unused code in touched files

## Primary references
- `docs/architecture/README.md`
- `docs/architecture/initializer-service-architecture.md`
- `docs/architecture/service-layer-patterns.md`
- `docs/architecture/VALIDATION_CODING_RULES.md`
- `docs/bab/CODING_RULES.md` when working in BAB
